heading: Indian housing plans
label: 4112 Indian housing plans

Amendments2008—Subsec. (a)(1)(A). , added subpar. (A) and struck out former subpar. (A) which read as follows: “for an Indian tribe to submit to the Secretary, for each fiscal year, a housing plan under this section for the tribe; or”.Pub. L. 110–411, § 102(1)(A)Subsec. (a)(1)(B). , substituted “subsection (c)” for “subsection (d)”.Pub. L. 110–411, § 102(1)(B)Subsecs. (b), (c). , (3), added subsec. (b), redesignated subsec. (d) as (c), and struck out former subsecs. (b) and (c) which required housing plans to contain certain information relating to a 5-year period and a 1-year period, respectively.Pub. L. 110–411, § 102(2)Subsec. (d). , (4), redesignated subsec. (e) as (d) and substituted “subsection (c)” for “subsection (d)”. Former subsec. (d) redesignated (c).Pub. L. 110–411, § 102(3)Subsecs. (e), (f). , redesignated subsecs. (e) and (f) as (d) and (e), respectively.Pub. L. 110–411, § 102(3)2000—Subsec. (c)(6). , and , amended subsec. (c) identically, adding par. (6).Pub. L. 106–568, § 1003(b)Pub. L. 106–569, § 503(b)Subsecs. (f), (g). , and , amended section identically, redesignating subsec. (g) as (f) and striking out heading and text of former subsec. (f). Text read as follows:Pub. L. 106–568, § 1003(c)Pub. L. 106–569, § 503(c)“(1) .—The Secretary may—Separate requirements“(A) establish requirements for submission of plans under this section and the information to be included in such plans applicable to small Indian tribes and small tribally designated housing entities; and“(B) waive any requirements under this section that the Secretary determines are burdensome or unnecessary for such tribes and housing entities.“(2) .—The Secretary may define small Indian tribes and small tribally designated housing entities based on the number of dwelling units assisted under this subchapter by the tribe or housing entity or owned or operated pursuant to a contract under the United States Housing Act of 1937 between the Secretary and the Indian housing authority for the tribe.”Small tribes1998—Subsec. (a). redesignated par. (1) as (1)(A), par. (2) as (1)(B), and par. (3) as (2), and inserted “or” at end of par. (1)(A).Pub. L. 105–276

Effective DateSection effective on the date provided by the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development pursuant to to provide for timely submission and review of Indian housing plans as necessary for the provision of assistance under this chapter in fiscal year 1998, see .section 4116(a) of this titlesection 4113(e) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: for an Indian tribe to submit to the Secretary, by not later than 75 days before the beginning of each tribal program year, a 1-year housing plan for the Indian tribe; or

children.label: B
children.text: for the tribally designated housing entity for the tribe to submit the plan as provided in subsection (c) for the tribe; and
for the review of such plans.

children.label: A
children.text: be in such form as the Secretary may prescribe; and

children.label: B
children.text: contain the information described in paragraph (2).

children.label: i
children.text: the types of household to receive assistance;

children.label: ii
children.text: the types and levels of assistance to be provided;

children.label: iii
children.text: the number of units planned to be produced;

children.label: I
children.text: a description of any housing to be demolished or disposed of;

children.label: II
children.text: a timetable for the demolition or disposition; and

children.label: III
children.text: any other information required by the Secretary with respect to the demolition or disposition;

children.label: v
children.text: a description of the manner in which the recipient will protect and maintain the viability of housing owned and operated by the recipient that was developed under a contract between the Secretary and an Indian housing authority pursuant to the United States Housing Act of 1937 ( et seq.); and42 U.S.C. 1437

children.label: vi
children.text: outcomes anticipated to be achieved by the recipient.

children.label: i
children.text: a description of the estimated housing needs and the need for assistance for the low-income Indian families in the jurisdiction, including a description of the manner in which the geographical distribution of assistance is consistent with the geographical needs and needs for various categories of housing assistance; and

children.label: ii
children.text: a description of the estimated housing needs for all Indian families in the jurisdiction.

children.label: i
children.text: an identification and description of the financial resources reasonably available to the recipient to carry out the purposes of this chapter, including an explanation of the manner in which amounts made available will leverage additional resources; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the uses to which those resources will be committed, including eligible and required affordable housing activities under subchapter II and administrative expenses.

children.label: i
children.text: a certification that, in carrying out this chapter, the recipient will comply with the applicable provisions of title II of the Civil Rights Act of 1968 ( et seq.) and other applicable Federal laws and regulations;25 U.S.C. 1301

children.label: ii
children.text: a certification that the recipient will maintain adequate insurance coverage for housing units that are owned and operated or assisted with grant amounts provided under this chapter, in compliance with such requirements as the Secretary may establish;

children.label: iii
children.text: a certification that policies are in effect and are available for review by the Secretary and the public governing the eligibility, admission, and occupancy of families for housing assisted with grant amounts provided under this chapter;

children.label: iv
children.text: a certification that policies are in effect and are available for review by the Secretary and the public governing rents and homebuyer payments charged, including the methods by which the rents or homebuyer payments are determined, for housing assisted with grant amounts provided under this chapter;

children.label: v
children.text: a certification that policies are in effect and are available for review by the Secretary and the public governing the management and maintenance of housing assisted with grant amounts provided under this chapter; and

children.label: vi
children.text: a certification that the recipient will comply with .section 4114(b) of this title

children.heading: Participation of tribally designated housing entity
children.label: c Participation of tribally designated housing entity

children.text: has had an opportunity to review the plan and has authorized the submission of the plan by the housing entity; or
has delegated to such tribally designated housing entity the authority to submit a plan on behalf of the tribe without prior review by the tribe.

children.heading: Coordination of plans
children.label: d Coordination of plans
children.text: A plan under this section may cover more than 1 Indian tribe, but only if the certification requirements under subsection (c) are complied with by each such grant beneficiary covered.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: e Regulations
children.text: The requirements relating to the contents of plans under this section shall be established by regulation, pursuant to .section 4116 of this title
